recommendations.details: Create a workflow that classifies new backlog items, prioritizes them, and promotes only accepted recommendations into implementation work.
recommendations.summary: Classify backlog intake and keep the queue ordered by urgency and dependency.
recommendations.title: Add a backlog-triage workflow to classify and prioritize new items

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that converts accepted recommendations into implementation tasks with explicit success criteria, keeping the recommendation open until derived work closes.
recommendations.summary: Turn accepted backlog recommendations into executable tasks.
recommendations.title: Add a recommendation-to-task workflow to promote accepted recommendations into implementation tasks

recommendations.details: Create a workflow for executing implementation tasks end to end, including status updates, commit capture, verification, and closeout evidence.
recommendations.summary: Track implementation through commit and verification evidence.
recommendations.title: Add an implementation-execution workflow that updates task status, captures commit SHAs, and verifies completion

recommendations.details: Create a weekly workflow that re-sorts priorities, flags stale items, and enforces work-in-progress limits on active backlog items.
recommendations.summary: Review backlog health on a regular cadence.
recommendations.title: Add a weekly-backlog-review workflow to refresh priority, identify stale items, and enforce WIP limits

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that promotes reusable skill gaps into new or updated skills, or discovers and installs external skills when they are a better fit.
recommendations.summary: Turn repeated gaps into skill updates or installs.
recommendations.title: Add a skill-maintenance workflow for reusable skill gaps and external skill discovery

recommendations.details: Create a workflow that routes recurring failures into the systematic-debugging skill before any patching, so root causes are understood before mutation.
recommendations.summary: Make repeated failures go through a deeper debug path.
recommendations.title: Add a debug-deep-dive workflow that invokes systematic debugging before patching repeated failures

recommendations.details: Create a skill that reviews new backlog items and classifies them as recommendations, implementation tasks, or noise before they enter the active queue.
recommendations.summary: Classify incoming backlog items consistently.
recommendations.title: Add a backlog-triage skill to classify new items as recommendation, task, or noise

recommendations.details: Create a skill that decomposes accepted recommendations into implementation-ready tasks with clear acceptance criteria and manageable scope.
recommendations.summary: Break recommendations into executable units.
recommendations.title: Add a task-decomposition skill to convert recommendations into implementation-ready tasks

recommendations.details: Create a skill that reports backlog aging, active work, completion rates, and other project-health signals for regular review.
recommendations.summary: Summarize backlog health and flow metrics.
recommendations.title: Add a project-insights skill to report backlog health, aging items, WIP, and completion rates

recommendations.details: Create a skill that reviews overdue backlog items and decides whether to keep them active, defer them, or drop them from the canonical queue.
recommendations.summary: Prune or defer stale backlog items consistently.
recommendations.title: Add a stale-item-review skill to review overdue backlog items and decide whether to keep, defer, or drop them

recommendations.details: Create a skill that translates backlog items into GitHub Issues or GitHub Projects entries with clean titles, summaries, and acceptance criteria.
recommendations.summary: Write backlog items into GitHub issue/project surfaces.
recommendations.title: Add an issue-writing skill to turn backlog items into GitHub Issues or GitHub Projects entries cleanly

recommendations.details: Trim the session-start guidance so the Superpowers overlay primes behavior without becoming a heavy always-on context payload.
recommendations.summary: Reduce startup overhead and keep the primer lean.
recommendations.title: Keep the Superpowers startup hook minimal so it primes behavior without loading a large always-on payload

recommendations.details: Add rules that keep runtime policy in core Codex and reserve Superpowers skills for behavior-shaping content, not execution control.
recommendations.summary: Clarify which layer owns policy versus behavior.
recommendations.title: Add rules that prefer core runtime skills for policy and Superpowers skills for behavior-shaping work

recommendations.details: Add rules that force verification and review before any work can be marked complete or closed out in the backlog.
recommendations.summary: Make review and verification mandatory before completion.
recommendations.title: Add rules that require verification and review before marking work complete

recommendations.details: Add rules that keep one canonical backlog, separate recommendations from tasks, and close recommendations only after derived tasks are committed and verified.
recommendations.summary: Keep backlog data canonical and type-separated.
recommendations.title: Add rules for single-source-of-truth backlog management and for separating recommendations from implementation tasks

recommendations.details: Keep skill loading metadata-only by default so workflows only pull full skill bodies when they explicitly need more context.
recommendations.summary: Minimize loaded skill context by default.
recommendations.title: Keep metadata-only skill loading as the default unless a workflow explicitly needs more context

recommendations.details: Extend skill-gap handling so repeated reusable gaps can become new skills or external installs, instead of only being recorded as memory.
recommendations.summary: Promote repeated gaps into reusable skills.
recommendations.title: Expand skill-gap promotion so reusable gaps become new skills or external installs, not just memory entries

recommendations.details: Add a bootstrap check that verifies the Superpowers submodule is present and initialized for fresh clones before any workflow depends on it.
recommendations.summary: Fail fast if the Superpowers submodule is missing or uninitialized.
recommendations.title: Add a lightweight bootstrap check for the submodule so fresh clones initialize superpowers cleanly

recommendations.details:
The runtime classified this prompt as a reusable skill gap.

Target: create_skill
Source prompt:
I have a knowledge gap and want to extract skill from this recurring pattern.

Promote the reusable behavior into a skill or install an existing external skill.
recommendations.summary: Create reusable skill from a reusable skill gap.
recommendations.title: Promote reusable skill gap: I have a knowledge gap and want to extract skill from this recurring pattern.

recommendations.details: implement next open recommendation
recommendations.summary: implement next open recommendation
recommendations.title: implement next open recommendation
